top_findings.summary: The skill requires a unified OAuth token that requests broad scopes for multiple Google services (e.g., Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Calendar, Drive, Tasks, Slides) upfront, even when the user may only need access to a single service. This violates data minimization principles by collecting more permissions than necessary for the stated purpose of providing shared resources for Google integration skills. While designed for convenience, it forces users to grant excessive access rights unrelated to their immediate needs.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requires a unified OAuth token that requests broad scopes for multiple Google services (e.g., Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Calendar, Drive, Tasks, Slides) upfront, even when the user may only need access to a single service. This violates data minimization principles by collecting more permissions than necessary for the stated purpose of providing shared resources for Google integration skills. While designed for convenience, it forces users to grant excessive access rights unrelated to their immediate needs.
